reviews.comment:
Estacion de servicio completa. Aunque haya fila avanza rapido porque hay muchas islas. Tiene una Full para tomar algo. Atencion: algo que poca gente sabe es que en el edificio del ACA (mismo edificio) hay un museo del automovil maravilloso y gratuiti. Si van a cargar ahi, sobre todo con chicos, val la pena bajar 5 minutos.

(Translated by Google)
Complete service station. Even if there is a line, it moves quickly because there are many islands. It has a Full to drink something. Attention: something that few people know is that in the ACA building (same building) there is a wonderful and free automobile museum. If you are going to load there, especially with kids, it is worth going down for 5 minutes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBLTRqckt3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muchas islas de carga pero la gente trabaja a media máquina, tardan muchísimo para casi todo. Lo bueno es el descuento del ACA y que se puede hacer cualquier trámite ahí.

(Translated by Google)
There are plenty of loading bays, but people are working at half speed, taking forever to complete almost everything. The good thing is the ACA discount and the fact that you can do any kind of transaction there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnOElmZVBnEAE

reviews.comment:
fui a renovar el registro. Excelente atención y servicios.

(Translated by Google)
I went to renew my registration. Excellent service and attention.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBX2VfLXhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Renovada tanto en surtidores cómo en la cafetería. Lástima los nuevos equipos son más lentos a nivel sistema para cobrar y que no dejaron la división de diésel y nafta por lo que se hace una sola cola para ambos tipos de motor

(Translated by Google)
Both the pumps and the cafeteria have been renovated. It's a shame the new equipment is slower for checkout and that they didn't keep the separate diesel and gasoline pumps, so there's only one line for both types of fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRektuLTl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
El ACA es lo mas, los ángeles amarillos de la ruta. Siempre que pueden te dan una mano, más allá del problema por el que los llamaste

(Translated by Google)
The ACA is the best, the yellow angels of the road. They always lend a hand whenever they can, regardless of the problem you called them about.

reviews.comment:
Gasolinera muy buena la atención de los empleados, siempre están con mucha gente, tienen baños y además un local que puedas tomar un café y otros

(Translated by Google)
Very good gas station, the attention of the employees, they are always very busy, they have bathrooms and also a place where you can have a coffee and other things.
